name: global3-cloudflare-pages-kv-d1-complet
description: GLOBAL 3 - Cloudflare Pages complet avec Pages Functions, KV et D1

scripts.check: node --check public/assets/app.js && node --check functions/_utils.js && node --check functions/api/health.js && node --check functions/api/load.js && node --check functions/api/save.js && node --check functions/api/session.js
scripts.deploy: wrangler pages deploy public --project-name global3-saas-kv-d1 --branch production
